strategies.name: C/C++ Baseline
checks: if [ -f CMakeLists.txt ]; then cmake -S . -B build/lab-tournament-baseline -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo -DBUILD_TESTING=ON && cmake --build build/lab-tournament-baseline -j && ctest --test-dir build/lab-tournament-baseline --output-on-failure; elif [ -f Makefile ]; then make -j; else echo 'Missing CMakeLists.txt or Makefile' >&2; exit 1; fi

strategies.name: Clang-Format Autofix
mutate: if command -v clang-format >/dev/null 2>&1; then find src include tests -type f \( -name '*.c' -o -name '*.cc' -o -name '*.cpp' -o -name '*.h' -o -name '*.hpp' \) -print0 2>/dev/null | xargs -0 -r clang-format -i; else echo 'Missing clang-format' >&2; exit 1; fi
checks: if command -v clang-format >/dev/null 2>&1; then find src include tests -type f \( -name '*.c' -o -name '*.cc' -o -name '*.cpp' -o -name '*.h' -o -name '*.hpp' \) -print0 2>/dev/null | xargs -0 -r clang-format --dry-run --Werror; else echo 'Missing clang-format' >&2; exit 1; fi

if [ -f CMakeLists.txt ]; then cmake -S . -B build/lab-tournament-format -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo -DBUILD_TESTING=ON && cmake --build build/lab-tournament-format -j && ctest --test-dir build/lab-tournament-format --output-on-failure; elif [ -f Makefile ]; then make -j; else echo 'Missing CMakeLists.txt or Makefile' >&2; exit 1; fi

strategies.name: Cppcheck Pass
checks: if command -v cppcheck >/dev/null 2>&1; then cppcheck --enable=warning,style,performance,portability --error-exitcode=1 --std=c11 --std=c++20 src include tests; else echo 'cppcheck not installed; skipping static analysis'; fi

if [ -f CMakeLists.txt ]; then cmake -S . -B build/lab-tournament-cppcheck -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo -DBUILD_TESTING=ON && cmake --build build/lab-tournament-cppcheck -j && ctest --test-dir build/lab-tournament-cppcheck --output-on-failure; elif [ -f Makefile ]; then make -j; else echo 'Missing CMakeLists.txt or Makefile' >&2; exit 1; fi
